name: io.github.teampolarity/cosmos-mcp
description: Personal knowledge graph every MCP client reads from and writes to. Portable across agents.

environmentVariables.name: COSMOS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: pmk_ key from https://cosmos.polarity-lab.com/connectors. Optional on macOS once the system keychain is provisioned via `npx -y @polarity-lab/cosmos-mcp provision pmk_...`.
